tech_news.title: Ford Mustang GTD Crushes Corvette ZR1X's Nürburgring Record With 6:40 Lap - Motor1.com
tech_news.description: Ford has regained the title for the fastest American production car at the Nürburgring after beating the Corvette ZR1X's lap time by more than eight seconds.

tech_news.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

tech_news.title: Acura evaluating future of GTP program - RACER - Racing News
tech_news.description: After nine combined seasons of factory racing in IMSA’s DPi and GTP classes, Acura is exploring whether the current season will be its last in the headlining category.

tech_news.title: The Most Secret Items In ‘Crimson Desert’ Have Just Been Found - Forbes
iOS 27 rumored to bring new design changes in two key areas - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: The next major iPhone software update, iOS 27, is rumored to bring change in two new areas related to Apple’s Liquid Glass design.

tech_news.title: Three Microsoft Defender Zero-Days Actively Exploited; Two Still Unpatched - The Hacker News
tech_news.description: Three Defender zero-days exploited since April 10, 2026, enabling privilege escalation and DoS, forcing isolation of affected systems.

tech_news.title: TCL Says Screw All Those New RGB TVs, Even Its Own - Gizmodo
tech_news.description: TCL now has its own RGB TV that it explicitly says offers less value than its new 'super quantum dot' mini LED screens.

tech_news.title: Netflix plans to add a vertical video feed, use AI for recommendations - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Netflix is going to launch a TikTok-like vertical video feed within its apps this month, and plans to use AI broadly for content creation and recommendations.
